import pytest
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from reportportal_client import step

from driver.driver_actions import DriverActions


@pytest.mark.name("test_case")
def test_test_case(actions: DriverActions):
    with step("[Action] Tap btnSettings at (48.0%, 50.0%)"):
        actions.tap_within_element(AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, 'btnSettings', 48.0, 50.0)
    assert True
step_001_t5:
import pytest
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from reportportal_client import step

from driver.driver_actions import DriverActions


@pytest.mark.name("test_case")
def test_test_case(actions: DriverActions):
    with step("[Action] Tap About at (46.2%, 41.2%)"):
        actions.tap_within_element(AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, 'About', 46.2, 41.2, container_by=AppiumBy.XPATH, container_value='//XCUIElementTypeOther[@name="photodirector.SettingPageViewController"]/XCUIElementTypeScrollView/XCUIElementTypeOther[1]/XCUIElementTypeCollectionView', container_w=320, container_h=521)
    assert True
step_002_t5:
import pytest
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from reportportal_client import step

from driver.driver_actions import DriverActions


@pytest.mark.name("test_case")
def test_test_case(actions: DriverActions):
    with step("[Action] Five tap developerButton at (44.4%, 29.7%)"):
        actions.five_tap_within_element(AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, 'developerButton', 44.4, 29.7)
    assert True
